description: Curated demo sanctioned ZEC address set. NOT a real OFAC list. The single entry is a fresh mainnet SHIELDED unified address (no real-world association) that demo-wallet-B sends to for the FAIL flow. It MUST be shielded: the scanner only recovers Sapling/Orchard outputs via OVK trial decryption, so a transparent t-addr recipient would be invisible (false PASS). Minted via `cargo run -p clean-wallet-scanner --bin gen-watchlist -- <seed>`.
hashEncoding: The scanner hashes each recovered recipient as '0x'+hex(sha256(recipient_string)). For an Orchard recipient the recipient_string is hex(orchard_address.to_raw_address_bytes()); for a Sapling recipient it is the 'zs1...' ZcashAddress string. Zashi is Orchard-first, so a payment to the unified address below is recovered via the Orchard path and matches `orchardHash`.
